misc: Waters the course more than the course sprinklers.
biography: Pekka, a formidable presence hailing from Espoo Ringside Golf, brings a unique blend of skill and dedication to the greens of the Hector Trophée. Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Pekka's commitment extends beyond his own performance; rumor has it he waters the course more diligently than the course sprinklers themselves, ensuring the perfect conditions for play.

With seven past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Pekka is a familiar face at the tournament, demonstrating a consistent passion for the sport and a keen understanding of the nuances required to succeed in this challenging competition. His crowning achievement to date is a single victory in the Hector Trophée, a testament to his skill and strategic prowess on the course. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, Pekka's determination remains unwavering.

As he prepares for his eighth appearance at Hector Trophée 2026, Pekka remains an active and respected figure in the Hector community, admired for his sportsmanship and unwavering enthusiasm for the game.
